title: Tomateux and Plumpride Tart
description: A sweet and savory tart featuring the unique flavors of Tomateux and Plumpride.
instructions: Roll out the almond flour to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Transfer the dough to a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
Arrange the Tomateux and Plumpride in a pattern on the dough.
Drizzle the melted butter over the fruit.
Sprinkle the granulated sugar over the fruit.
Pour the beaten egg over the fruit.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the crust is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
